backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the plant e-commerce backend, defining data types (Product, Category, Cart, Order, etc.) and CRUD endpoints for products, categories, carts, wishlists, reviews, user profiles, addresses, and Stripe payment integration, with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three currency-selector features (INR/USD toggle, price formatting, useCurrency hook) to their implementing frontend files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Human-readable summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and currency-related changes made to pages, components, and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Plant Ecommerce Platform' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes, wrapping the router in CurrencyProvider (outermost) and CartProvider to provide global currency and cart state.
frontend/src/components/CategoryManageme: Admin UI component for listing, creating, editing, and deleting product categories, using a dialog form with auto-slug generation and React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, social links, and navigation columns for Shop and Account sections using TanStack Router Links.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, nav links, currency switcher (INR/USD), cart icon with item count, and an auth dropdown menu supporting Internet Identity login/logout.
frontend/src/components/ImageGallery.tsx: Image gallery component displaying a main image with prev/next navigation arrows and a row of clickable thumbnails, falling back to a placeholder on error.
frontend/src/components/OrderHistory.tsx: Placeholder component shown on the user dashboard indicating no orders exist yet, with a 'coming soon' notice.
Placeholder admin component for order management that displays a 'coming soon' message with an icon and description.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Card component for a single product showing image, category badge, name, description, price, and buttons to add to cart or wishlist, with out-of-stock handling.
frontend/src/components/ProductManagemen: Admin CRUD interface for products featuring a table of existing products and a dialog form to create or edit product details including specs, images, variants, and pricing.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog shown to newly authenticated users to collect their name and email, saving the profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: A route guard component that shows a loading spinner during initialization, a login prompt if unauthenticated, or an access-denied message if admin access is required but not granted.
frontend/src/components/SavedAddresses.t: Displays a user's saved addresses with add/edit/delete functionality via a dialog form, backed by React Query hooks for CRUD operations.
frontend/src/components/StripeSetup.tsx: Admin form component for configuring Stripe payment processing by submitting a secret key and allowed countries, showing a confirmation state if already configured.
frontend/src/components/Wishlist.tsx: Renders the user's wishlist by cross-referencing wishlist item IDs with product data, allowing items to be added to cart or removed from the wishlist.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.tsx: Provides a CartContext with localStorage persistence and backend sync for cart items, exposing add, remove, update, and clear operations via a useCart hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrency.tsx: Provides a CurrencyContext that stores the selected currency (INR/USD) in localStorage and exposes a formatPrice function that converts paise-denominated prices to the chosen currency.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend actor interactions including user profiles, products, categories, cart, addresses, wishlist, orders, reviews, and Stripe checkout.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind directives, defining an eco-friendly green CSS custom property palette for both light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel page that checks caller admin status and renders tabbed management sections for products, categories, orders, and Stripe setup, wrapped in a ProtectedRoute.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page displaying cart items with quantity controls and removal, plus an order summary with subtotal, shipping, tax, and total calculated in INR paise with currency formatting.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Checkout page allowing users to select or add a delivery address and initiate a Stripe checkout session, protected by authentication and displaying an order summary.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: User dashboard page with a profile header and tabbed interface for viewing order history, saved addresses, and wishlist. Wrapped in a ProtectedRoute to require authentication.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Homepage featuring a hero banner, featured product grid, category cards, testimonials, and a newsletter signup form. Fetches products via useGetProducts and navigates to the product listing.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Payment failure page displaying an error message, common failure reasons, and action buttons to retry checkout, return to cart, or go home.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Payment success page that clears the cart on mount and shows order confirmation details with next-steps info and links to the dashboard or home.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetails.tsx: Product detail page showing an image gallery, specs, add-to-cart/wishlist actions, related products, and a reviews/rating submission tab. Fetches product by slug and related data via custom query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/ProductListing.tsx: Product listing page with client-side filtering (category, price range, plant type, sunlight, size, search), sorting, and pagination. Renders filtered products in a grid using ProductCard components.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those values via sessionStorage and history.replaceState.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom fonts (DM Sans, Playfair Display), an extended color palette using OKLCH CSS variables, custom border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes for the frontend.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state for a plant-focused ecommerce platform, including architecture notes, existing features, known issues, and versioning metadata for planning and build continuity.
